/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -pie --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/euxis-inference-cpp_tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/euxis-inference-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-inference-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_model_registry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-inference-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_quality_gate.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-inference-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_llama_engine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-inference-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_llama_engine_api.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-inference-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_ollama_engine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-inference-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_ollama_engine_api.cpp.o" -o euxis-inference-cpp_tests  libeuxis-inference-cpp.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libsodium.so /usr/lib/libspdlog.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0 /usr/lib/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
